meta.disclaimer: Meridian Financial Group is a FICTIONAL company created for demonstration. All names, figures, vendors and outcomes are illustrative and do not represent any real organisation.

decisionLegend.scale: Evidence supports larger rollout; economics defensible
decisionLegend.fix: Promising but readiness, data, control or workflow design is weak
decisionLegend.stop: Vendor story is better than the operating case

company.name: Meridian Financial Group
company.profile: ASX-listed mid-tier banking and wealth group. ~6,800 staff across retail banking, business banking, wealth, and group functions. Heavy regulatory load (APRA, AUSTRAC, ASIC). AI activity spread across 7 business units with no central economic view.
company.headlineQuestion: Across all our AI activity, what does it cost, where is it earning back, and what should we scale, fix or stop?

headlines: A$3.71M of annual AI spend is live across 10 use cases and 7 business units, with no single owner of the economics.
A$526K/yr sits in 2 'stop' use cases where the vendor story beats the operating case.
A$726K/yr of spend carries unmanaged (red) risk, concentrated in financial-crime and collections workflows.
Only 4 of 10 use cases have high-confidence outcome evidence; the rest rely on vendor or anecdotal claims.

useCases.name: Contact Centre Copilot
useCases.workflow: Live call assist, response drafting, post-call wrap-up notes

outcome.evidence: 12% measured AHT reduction over 6 months; cost per resolved case A$4.10 -> A$3.20

risk.notes: PII handled in-tenant; no model training on customer data; QA sampling in place

useCases.nextAction: Expand to outbound retention team; renegotiate licence on proven usage

value.basis: 12% measured AHT reduction across 800 agents -> freed capacity and avoided seasonal hires; cost per resolved case A$4.10 -> A$3.20. Independently validated across 3 contact centres.
value.bankedBasis: A$780K booked — seasonal and backfill hiring avoided across 3 centres. The rest is freed handle-time capacity not yet converted to cost-out.

useCases.name: Fraud Alert Triage Agent
useCases.workflow: Auto-triage of fraud alerts, evidence gathering, recommended disposition

outcome.evidence: Throughput +28% on pilot queue; false positives -18%; confidence improving

risk.notes: Agent action scope expanding; audit trail adequate but model-decision explainability needs work before full automation

useCases.nextAction: Extend to scam and account-takeover queues with explainability controls

value.basis: +28% analyst throughput (45 analysts) plus faster triage cutting fraud losses; false positives -18%. Benefit = analyst capacity released + avoided fraud loss, measured on the card-fraud pilot queue.
value.bankedBasis: A$650K of prevented fraud losses booked to the P&L. The analyst-throughput gain is real capacity but has not been taken as cost.

useCases.name: Credit Memo Drafting Assistant
useCases.workflow: Draft credit memos from financials, risk notes and policy

outcome.evidence: Self-reported time savings only; no controlled baseline; output quality variable

risk.notes: Policy-grounding incomplete; risk of un-cited figures entering credit decisions

useCases.nextAction: Add retrieval grounding to policy + financials; set a measured baseline before scaling

value.basis: Self-reported ~35% drafting-time saving across 120 analysts, NOT validated against a controlled baseline; output quality variable. Projected only - not yet bankable.
value.bankedBasis: Nothing banked — no controlled baseline; the saving is self-reported drafting time, not a booked number.

useCases.name: AML / KYC Document Review
useCases.workflow: Extract and verify entity data from onboarding documents; flag discrepancies

outcome.primaryMetric: KYC review cycle time / extraction accuracy
outcome.evidence: Cycle-time gain offset by manual re-checking; extraction accuracy below threshold on complex structures

risk.notes: AUSTRAC-relevant workflow; current evidence and audit trail insufficient for regulated reliance

useCases.nextAction: Tighten human-verification gate; build audit evidence before any reliance claim

value.basis: Cycle-time gains largely offset by manual re-checking; extraction accuracy below threshold on complex structures. Net realised benefit minimal, and AUSTRAC-relevant work cannot creditably rely on unverified output.
value.bankedBasis: Nothing banked — cycle-time gains are offset by manual re-checking; no hard saving has reached the P&L.

useCases.name: Developer Code Assistant
useCases.workflow: In-IDE code completion, test generation, code review assist

outcome.evidence: PR throughput +22%; suggestion acceptance 31%; developer satisfaction high

risk.notes: No proprietary code used for training; IP and secrets scanning in pipeline

useCases.nextAction: Standardise across all squads; track sustained throughput vs licence cost

value.basis: +22% PR throughput across 600 engineers at loaded engineering cost; 31% suggestion acceptance. Benefit = realised delivery capacity reinvested, measured pre/post.
value.bankedBasis: A$120K of contractor spend reduced. The 22% throughput gain is reinvested into delivery, not taken as cash — the classic developer-productivity gap between value and P&L.

useCases.name: Marketing Content Studio

outcome.evidence: Only 28% of seats active monthly; no measurable throughput or cost-per-asset gain; licence waste high

risk.notes: Brand and disclosure risk on generated imagery; light review process

useCases.nextAction: Reduce to a small power-user pool; reclaim ~A$140K of idle licences

value.basis: Only 28% of 180 seats active monthly; no measurable throughput or cost-per-asset gain. Realised value limited to a small power-user pool; ~A$140K of idle licences reclaimable.
value.bankedBasis: Nothing banked. ~A$140K of idle licences is bankable on a seat reduction, but no action has been taken.

useCases.name: Wealth Advisor Meeting Summariser
useCases.workflow: Transcribe and summarise advice meetings; draft file notes and next steps

outcome.evidence: Admin time -25% measured; file-note completeness up; advisers spend more time with clients

risk.notes: Client consent captured; recordings retained per policy; adviser sign-off on every note

useCases.nextAction: Integrate into advice CRM; extend to review-meeting workflow

value.basis: -25% adviser admin time across 250 advisers redeployed to client-facing advice; file-note completeness up. Benefit = additional advice capacity at adviser margin, measured.
value.bankedBasis: A$290K of incremental advice revenue booked from redeployed adviser time. Remaining freed capacity is not yet converted to revenue or cost-out.

useCases.name: Complaints Handling Assistant
useCases.workflow: Summarise complaint history, draft responses, suggest remediation

outcome.evidence: Cycle time improving but mis-classification of escalation cases observed; needs tuning

risk.notes: Regulated complaints (ASIC) require accurate escalation; current error rate too high for reliance

useCases.nextAction: Improve escalation classifier; add mandatory specialist review on high-risk cases

value.basis: Resolution cycle time improving, but escalation mis-classification observed; benefit partly realised and partly at risk until the classifier is fixed. ASIC-regulated, so reliance needs the error rate down first.
value.bankedBasis: Nothing banked — gated on fixing the escalation classifier before any reliance or saving can be claimed.

useCases.name: Collections Outreach Agent
useCases.workflow: Automated, personalised customer outreach and repayment-plan suggestions

outcome.evidence: Vendor-promised uplift not yet evidenced on bank data; sample too small

risk.notes: Hardship and financial-difficulty obligations; automated outreach carries significant conduct risk; controls immature

useCases.nextAction: Pause automated outreach; revisit only with conduct-risk controls and human approval gate

value.basis: Vendor projects ~A$520K contact/cure-rate uplift, but it is not evidenced on bank data and the sample is too small - on a defensible basis the realised benefit is unproven (A$0). Automated hardship outreach also carries significant conduct risk.
value.bankedBasis: Nothing banked; the benefit is unproven and the use case is paused.

useCases.name: Regulatory Reporting Drafter
useCases.workflow: Draft narrative sections of APRA / ASIC returns from source data

outcome.evidence: Drafting effort down, but every output requires full human verification; net gain modest

risk.notes: Regulator-facing output; accuracy and provenance controls must precede any reliance

useCases.nextAction: Ground on source-of-truth data; formalise verification and provenance before scaling

value.basis: Drafting effort down, but every output needs full human verification, so net effort saving is modest. Regulator-facing; benefit is not creditable until provenance controls are in place.
value.bankedBasis: Nothing banked — regulator-facing output is verification-gated and the net effort saving is modest.
